title: Debt Rescue: 'Thank you, George – we’re honoured to walk this journey with you'
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you, George. We at...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you, George. We at Debt Rescue are honoured to receive the Best of George award in the category Best Debt Counsellor.


> It is a privilege to be recognised in this way, and we are truly grateful for the trust this reflects.


As many South Africans face rising financial challenges, this acknowledgement reminds us just how important it is to continue doing what we do, helping people find hope and regain control through the legal process of debt review.


> Debt Rescue has been in existence for 18 years, since the very beginning of the debt counselling industry.


Over the years, we have supported tens of thousands of individuals and families in navigating the pressures of debt, always with the same commitment: to provide real help, with compassion and care.

Debt review, introduced by the National Credit Act, is a structured process that allows over-indebted consumers to repay what they owe in a way they can afford.

It protects assets, ensures essential living costs are prioritised and helps restore peace of mind. It’s a lifeline for many and it works.


> At the helm of Debt Rescue is our CEO, Neil Roets, a passionate consumer activist and one of South Africa’s most experienced debt counsellors.


Since the industry began, Neil has worked tirelessly to promote ethical, transparent debt relief and to give a voice to over-indebted consumers across the country.

His dedication to justice and compassion remains at the heart of everything we do. We believe what truly sets us apart is how we treat the people who come to us.

Every situation is different. Every person’s story matters. That is why we take the time to understand your unique circumstances and offer personalised support tailored to your needs.

We are here to walk the journey with you.


> Debt Rescue is proud to be ranked #1 on South Africa’s Top 10 Debt Counsellors list.


Nationally, we have also received the Significant Contribution to the Industry Award and been named Best Debt Counsellor by both the public and our peers in the industry.

Our services are available countrywide, including right here in the Southern Cape.


> If you are struggling financially or feel like your debt is spiralling out of control, take that first step. As one client told us: “Debt Rescue helped me breathe again.”


Visit our website or call 0861 123 644 to speak to someone who truly cares.

Thank you, George, for this incredible honour. We remain committed to helping South Africans breathe again.

CEO Neil Roets – we’re honoured to walk this journey with you.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
